prompt:
Goal: Create an ultra-detailed cinematic product photograph of an ornate fantasy business card lying on a dark antique wooden desk, designed like a luxurious vintage ticket or guild identification card for 泡影堂 / HOU-EI-DO TRADING CO..

Canvas: Horizontal 3:2 composition, close-up three-quarter view, shallow depth of field, warm amber lamplight with cool blue reflections, high realism mixed with elegant anime-fantasy design.

Main object: One large cream-and-gold business card, landscape orientation, with an asymmetrical die-cut silhouette. The left side has a rounded arched portrait window and circular medallion; the right side is a rectangular information panel with clipped corners, thin gold borders, embossed filigree, holographic sparkles, tiny bubble motifs, and delicate floral engravings. The paper should look thick, pearlescent, aged ivory, and slightly glossy, with raised metallic gold ink.

Layout: Divide the card into exactly 2 main sections: 1) left portrait section, 2) right text information section. The left section contains exactly 1 anime-style male portrait, exactly 1 large circular emblem medallion with a floral crest, and numerous translucent bubbles over a moody window background. The right section contains exactly 9 visible information blocks: 1 company header, 1 department line, 1 large personal name line, 1 job title line, 3 ID-number rows, 1 signature row, and 1 address/contact row. Add exactly 1 QR code at the lower right and exactly 1 vertical serial-number strip on the far right edge.

Portrait details: The portrait shows a refined young male aesthetic officer in dark navy and black formal attire with gold chains, brooches, floral embroidery, and a high-collared shirt. He has short tousled dark hair with blue highlights. His face may be softly obscured or unfocused to keep the identity anonymous, while the outfit and hair remain sharp. Surround him with floating soap bubbles and small pale blossoms.

Text content: Use Japanese and English typographic hierarchy similar to a premium trading-company ID card. Include the large Japanese name 月詠 泡影 with small romanization beneath it, the company header “泡影堂” and “HOU-EI-DO TRADING CO.”, the department line “情報企画部・美学研究課 / Information & Aesthetics Dept.”, the title “主任研究員（美学士） / Chief Aesthetic Officer”, ID rows such as “EMP. ID CODE HD-0421-7A”, “MANAGEMENT NO. MGMT-8808”, and “LICENSE NO. LIC-TRD-1912-88”, a cursive signature reading “Tsukuyomi Houei”, an address/contact block, and a vertical serial label “SERIAL NO. 600711088”. Keep the typography legible but naturally integrated into the printed card.

Desk scene: Place exactly 7 surrounding props: 1 ornate glass perfume bottle on the far left, 1 warm lantern or window-like lamp behind the card, 1 brass pocket watch on the upper right, 1 fountain pen at the lower right, 1 black lacquer tray with gold floral decoration at the lower left, 1 braided cord or tassel charm near the bottom center, and 1 small metal key or hook beside the cord. Add scattered glass bubbles on and around the desk, but do not add extra cards.

Visual style: Luxurious steampunk-Victorian fantasy, Japanese antique stationery, gold foil stamping, delicate botanical ornament, transparent bubbles, cinematic bokeh, dramatic shadows, crisp macro detail, premium collectible card photography. Use warm gold, deep navy, black lacquer, ivory paper, and subtle iridescent blue highlights.

Constraints: Generate only one card, no hands, no modern plastic badge, no watermark, no extra logos beyond the crest and QR code, no misshapen typography, maintain a realistic tabletop perspective and a carefully crafted world-building atmosphere.
